name: Coast Tradelines
description_short: Coast Tradelines sells authorized user tradeline accounts to consumers seeking rapid credit score improvement. They claim to boost FICO scores through purchased seasoned credit card accounts.
description_long:
Coast Tradelines operates in the authorized user tradeline market, a sector where established credit card accounts are sold to consumers who become added as authorized users. The company positions itself as a credit-building solution targeting individuals with damaged or limited credit histories. According to their website content, they facilitate the purchase of tradelines—credit accounts with established payment history and low utilization ratios—which are then reported to credit bureaus on the buyer's credit report.

The company offers several core services: purchasing pre-selected tradelines, a "Pick Your Own Tradeline" selection feature, SSN validation for verification purposes, and a broker network program for sellers. They maintain educational content around tradeline mechanics, claiming consumers can see credit score improvements within 30 days. Coast Tradelines also operates a program allowing users to earn money by selling their own authorized user tradeline accounts through their platform.

What distinguishes Coast Tradelines is their two-sided marketplace model—functioning as both a buyer and seller platform. They provide extensive SEO-optimized educational content (over 100 articles on their site) discussing tradeline strategy, cost comparisons, and credit-building methodologies. Their "Brokers Club" suggests an affiliate or partner network component to their business model.

However, the legality and ethics of purchasing authorized user tradelines remain controversial. While adding authorized users to accounts is legal, the practice of paying for placement on others' accounts for credit-building purposes exists in a gray area that has drawn regulatory scrutiny. Consumers should understand that rapid credit score improvements from purchased tradelines are temporary—scores can decline if accounts are later removed or if the underlying account performance changes. The long-term sustainability and legitimacy of this approach as a credit-building method is disputed by credit bureaus and financial regulators.

For consumers building or rebuilding credit, the landscape includes several complementary tools. Secured credit cards require a deposit but report to all three bureaus, establishing payment history. Credit builder loans work similarly, holding funds in a savings account while you make payments. Rent reporting services can add on-time housing payments to credit files. For those with damaged credit, credit repair services address inaccurate negative items, while credit monitoring services track progress over time. A small installment loan with on-time payments reported to all three bureaus is one of the most effective ways to build a credit history from scratch.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Building Program
features: Reports to all three credit bureaus

pros: Offers a "Pick Your Own Tradeline" feature, allowing customers to select specific accounts rather than being assigned random ones
Provides SSN validation and verification services before purchase
Operates a dual-platform model allowing consumers to also earn money by selling their own tradelines
Extensive educational content library with 100+ articles explaining how tradelines work and credit mechanics
Offers a Brokers Club program suggesting partnership opportunities for financial professionals
Provides free tradeline assessment tools and credit score checking guidance
Claims rapid credit score improvements (30 days or less) with transparent posting timelines
cons: The legality of paid authorized user tradelines remains legally ambiguous and subject to regulatory scrutiny by credit bureaus
Credit score improvements are typically temporary and dependent on the continued presence of the purchased accounts; removal results in score decline
No transparent pricing information available on the website—customers must complete registration to see costs
The practice may violate credit card issuer terms of service and could result in account closure
Heavy focus on SEO-optimized blog content raises concerns about marketing-driven claims versus legitimate credit-building methodology
best_for: Consumers with limited credit history seeking rapid score improvement for near-term financing needs
Individuals with damaged credit who want quick results before mortgage or auto loan applications
Self-employed or freelance professionals looking to build credit quickly for business financing
diagnosis: Coast Tradelines is best for consumers needing immediate credit score boosts for near-term financial goals who understand the temporary nature of purchased tradeline benefits. The primary caveat is that while adding authorized users is legal, paying for placement exists in regulatory gray area with uncertain long-term sustainability, and improvements disappear if accounts are removed.
services: Purchase of authorized user tradelines from the company's inventory
Pick Your Own Tradeline selection tool for custom account choices
SSN validation and identity verification services
Account deposit processing and payment handling
Sell tradelines program to generate income from personal credit accounts
Brokers Club network and affiliate program
Free tradeline assessment and evaluation tools
Credit score checking and monitoring guidance
Educational articles and blog content on credit building strategy
FAQ resources for both cardholders and tradeline sellers
Personal consultation on earning potential from selling tradelines
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Coast Tradelines sells authorized user tradeline accounts to consumers seeking rapid credit score improvement.
